seoTitle: Middleton Beach vs Midland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Middleton Beach and Midland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Middleton Beach vs Midland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Middleton Beach and Midland.
heading: Middleton Beach vs Midland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Middleton Beach, Western Australia and Midland, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Midland has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Middleton Beach (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Middleton Beach or Midland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Middleton Beach has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Midland scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Middleton Beach scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Midland scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Middleton Beach or Midland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Midland has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
